what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a dragnet-development channel board item target.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id att-a8180f39, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, target board://item-2d98a3a6, and an ISO 8601 added timestamp.
The markdown body after the frontmatter is empty.
standouts: attachment_type is board_items, indicating it points to a board item.
Target uses a board://item-2d98a3a6 URI scheme.
The file is purely metadata with no payload body.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a Markdown file for structured metadata.
Uses UUID-style identifiers and ISO 8601 timestamps.
Uses a custom board:// URI to reference a board item.
concerns: Empty body provides no content or context for the attachment.
No author or provenance information is recorded.
The board:// target cannot be resolved from this file alone.
notes: A bare metadata pointer recording that a board item is attached to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What is the semantic content or title of board item item-2d98a3a6?
Who added this attachment and for what purpose?
Is the referenced board item still current and valid?
intention_signals: To create a persistent, discoverable record associating a specific board item with the dragnet-development channel as an attachment.
contribution: Provides a machine-readable attachment record that maps an identifier to a channel and a board item target, supporting indexing and retrieval of channel-related board references.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file in the dragnet-development channel pointing to board item item-2d98a3a6 via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To record and link a board item reference as an attachment within the dragnet-development channel memory.
